skills.name: Cooking Companion
skills.description: Hands-free cooking assistant - find a recipe, walk through it step by step and run kitchen timers by voice. Use when the user wants to cook something, asks for a recipe, needs help in the kitchen or asks for a cooking timer.

skills.name: Language Practice
skills.description: Conversational foreign language practice - everyday spoken dialogue with gentle corrections, a word of the day and progress tracking. Use when the user wants to practice or learn a foreign language, asks to talk in another language or to train vocabulary.

skills.name: Movie Night
skills.description: Recommend movies and TV shows to watch tonight - personalised picks based on the user's tastes and fresh ratings. Use when the user asks what to watch, wants a movie or series recommendation, or is planning a movie night.
